description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the nimlang/nim:latest Docker image with two stages: test and deploy. Add a test:devel job in the test stage that sets NIMBRANCH=devel, caches the directory nim-${NIMBRANCH}, runs a before_script that checks for nim-${NIMBRANCH}/bin/nim, clones the Nim repository and csources, builds Nim with sh build.sh, runs koch boot -d:release and koch nimble, updates PATH, then executes "nimble -v", "nim -v", and "nimble tests", allows failure, and is excluded from the gh-pages branch. Add a test:master job in the test stage that runs the same script commands "nimble -v", "nim -v", "nimble tests", is also excluded from gh-pages, but has no before_script, cache, or extra variables. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs only on the master branch, executes "nimble docs", runs a find‑exec sed command to replace "nesm.html" with "index.html" in the generated HTML, renames htmldocs/nesm.html to htmldocs/index.html, moves the htmldocs directory to public, and publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact.
